ClockCyteR.spatial 0.1.0

Calculate plot height from type and width

plot_height.Rd

Calculate plot height from type and width

Usage

plot_height(plot_type, plot_width, ...)

Arguments

plot_type

Character; plot-type key (see plot_group()).

plot_width

Numeric; plot width in pixels.

...

Optional: cell_coords (data frame with column Y) for "spatial" plots; node_data (data frame with column Y) for "network_spatial" plots.

Value

Numeric; recommended plot height in pixels.

On this page
